name: Java
description: Compile and run Java code in an isolated sandbox. Supports Java preview features. Common imports (java.util.*, java.io.*, java.math.*, java.util.stream.*) are auto-injected. Supports reading non-Java resource files (.json, .txt, .csv, etc.) via classpath or relative paths. When modifying code via patch, reuse existing variable names instead of redeclaring them.
command: mkdir -p /tmp/j && cp -r . /tmp/j/ && cd /tmp/j && for imp in 'java.util.*' 'java.io.*' 'java.math.*' 'java.util.stream.*'; do if ! grep -q "import $imp" Main.java 2>/dev/null; then cp Main.java /tmp/_jorig; rm -f Main.java; echo "import $imp;" > Main.java; cat /tmp/_jorig >> Main.java; fi; done && javac --enable-preview --source 21 -d /tmp/jout *.java && cp -rn /tmp/j/* /tmp/jout/ 2>/dev/null; java --enable-preview -cp /tmp/jout Main
